session.user: Run `uv run pytest tests/commands/land/ -v` and report the full results. Do not fix any errors, just report.
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest command for the land command tests and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest for land command tests with verbose output

session.assistant:
pytest failed: 1 issue found
**Failed Test:**
`tests/commands/land/test_git_pull.py::test_land_with_up_does_not_call_git_pull` (line 319) - Exit code: 1 (expected 0) - Test is checking that `land --up` does NOT call git pull when navigating to child branch
**Summary:** 56 tests passed, 1 test failed in 1.20s
The failing test is in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/land/test_git_pull.py` at line 319. The test expects exit code 0 but got exit code 1 when running `land --script --up --force`.
